name: Sangria Serrano
recipeIngredient: 1 quart apple juice or pineapple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the fruit and place it at the bottom of a large container with an attachable lid.
2. Pour in the juice.
3. Add the alcohol (wine, rum, Cointreau, vodka, Grand Marnier).
4. Stir in sugar to taste.
5. Just before serving, add ice and seltzer water.
6. Keep refrigerated and covered. Best when made a day or two in advance. Enjoy!
